name: Moroccan Tomato and Pepper Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Seeded and minced green chili pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the bell pepper on a baking sheet, 3 inches from the heat source, and turn frequently until charred on all sides. Transfer the pepper to a brown paper bag and let cool for 15 to 20 minutes.
2. Strain the pepper over a medium bowl, discarding the stem end and seeds. Allow the juice to drip into the bowl.
3. Cut the pepper into strips and add it with the juice to the bowl. Add diced tomato and cucumber, and toss to combine.
4. In a separate measuring cup or small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: lemon juice, water, olive oil, parsley, chili pepper, paprika, cumin, and garlic. Mix well.
5. Pour the dressing over the vegetables in the bowl and toss to coat evenly. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes. Makes 2 servings.
